deadlines.label: Abbott Ch. 1 done
deadlines.desc: The Real Numbers — completeness axiom, sup/inf, Archimedean property

deadlines.label: Abbott Ch. 2 done
deadlines.desc: Sequences and Series — ε-N definition, monotone convergence, Bolzano-Weierstrass

deadlines.label: Abbott Ch. 3 done
deadlines.desc: Basic Topology of ℝ — open/closed sets, compactness, connectedness

deadlines.label: Abbott Ch. 4 done + self-test
deadlines.desc: Functional Limits & Continuity — ε-δ mastered. Self-test: prove lim_{x→2}(3x+1)=7 and the neighbourhood theorem for f(a)>0.

deadlines.label: Axler Ch. 1 done
deadlines.desc: Vector Spaces — all 8 axioms, subspaces, span

deadlines.label: Axler Ch. 2 done
deadlines.desc: Finite-Dimensional Vector Spaces — linear independence, bases, dimension

deadlines.label: Axler Ch. 3 done + self-test
deadlines.desc: Linear Maps — kernel, image, rank-nullity theorem. Self-test: prove rank-nullity from scratch.

deadlines.label: Abbott Ch. 2–3 revisited
deadlines.desc: Cauchy sequences, uniform continuity, connectedness proofs — deeper level

deadlines.label: Abbott Ch. 6 done + self-test
deadlines.desc: Sequences and Series of Functions — uniform convergence, power series. Self-test: prove Bolzano-Weierstrass, show ℚ dense in ℝ.

deadlines.label: Abbott Ch. 5 done
deadlines.desc: The Derivative — MVT, Taylor's theorem with remainder, L'Hôpital rigorous

deadlines.label: Abbott Ch. 7 done + self-test
deadlines.desc: The Riemann Integral — formal definition, integrability, FTA proof. Self-test: state and prove FTA.

deadlines.label: Problem-solving sprint begins
deadlines.desc: Start working past Unige Analysis I + Algèbre Linéaire I exams — timed, cold, no notes

deadlines.label: Full mock exam
deadlines.desc: Complete a past Unige year-1 exam under real conditions. Self-assess honestly.

deadlines.label: Army ends
deadlines.desc: 10 months done. Post-army intensive phase begins (May–Sept 2027).
